calendar.matters:
Setting Hearing And Providing Notice Of Opportunity Under Civil Code Section 1670.5
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Matt Scherling, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, IVER CAPITAL CORPORATION,
No appearance by defaulted defendant THEODORE C. FRANCE,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

No witness appearing on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court ORDERED case DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
(See Scanned Order)
